description: Valid entity names that exist in the PankBase knowledge graph. Use ONLY these exact names in questions.
cell_types_note: IMPORTANT: Cell types like 'Macrophage', 'Stellate Cell', 'Endothelial Cell' do NOT exist in this database!
sample_gene_ontology_terms: RNA polymerase II cis-regulatory region sequence-specific DNA binding
go_terms_note: Note: GO terms must be EXACT matches. 'transcription' alone won't work - use full terms like 'positive regulation of transcription by RNA polymerase II'
tips: Use exact cell type names: 'Alpha Cell' not 'alpha cell' or 'Alpha Cells'
DEG_in works better than expression_level_in for finding expressed genes
Ask about specific GO terms, not general concepts like 'transcription'
Questions about genes + diseases (effector_gene_of) tend to succeed
Questions about genes + function annotations (function_annotation) tend to succeed
